response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in full-stack development with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the job requirements. They have worked on complex projects and demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent development and various backend technologies
Strong background in full-stack development with a focus on testable and maintainable code
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Less experience with Kotlin/Java compared to other technologies
Some projects mentioned are not directly related to the primary stack
